creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #2)
> From the initial look at this:
> 
> - Remove PORTREVISION, not needed on new port
Removed
Wasn't sure. As I noted; this is technically a "revived" port. :)
> 
> A question, is this valid?  ${REASON} isn't defined.
> 
> RESTRICTED=     ${REASON}
Hah! I can't believe I didn't catch this, myself!
I can only imagine that this macro was something to the effect of
RESTRICTED=    May contain original work by it's author

Removed. As I couldn't go back far enough in time on
the svn server to find it's original definition.

Please find an updated/revised shar(1) file, attached.

Thanks, Jason!

--Chris
